title: Publish storage growth and lifecycle health to Leitstand
goal: Collect hourly totals and daily producer detail, retain a bounded time series, and expose growth, top producers, unowned artifacts, expired retention and blocked cleanup candidates to Leitstand.

approval.note: Source changes and read-only verification are authorized. Runtime deletion or cleanup effects require a fresh exact-target plan and post-readback.

acceptance.assertion: Hourly and daily observations are bounded and monotonic in schema, not unbounded file append.
Leitstand shows total use, 24-hour growth, top producers, budget violations and cleanup blockers.
The surface distinguishes observed, estimated and unavailable values.
Threshold crossings produce one deduplicated notification rather than repeated noise.

metadata.source: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1 plan from live 2026-07-14 storage audit
does_not_establish: permission to bypass leases or dirty-state guards
metadata.readiness_basis: STORAGE-LIFECYCLE-V1-T006 verified by merged Heim-PC PR #48, exact current main readback, green CI and a current fail-closed no-write maintenance plan.
